author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Refer Your Friends and Get Rewarded With Starpath

Starpath is receiving a MASSIVE overhaul and is launching tomorrow, September 20th.

What's new with this overhaul?  
 Referrers receive 25% of the amount referees spend on primary sales for ONE YEAR. Following that year, referrers will then receive 5% for the duration of the Starpath program.
 Referrers receive 25% of ATMTA's share of the fee during secondary sales.
 Each new referee receives 10% off primary sales, usable for 90 days.
 For the duration of the Golden Ticket event in SAGE Labs, every $500 USDC equivalent of value transacted will also award the referrer 1 Golden Ticket to enter into drawings.

You can sign up for Starpath tomorrow via a link in your https://play.staratlas.com/ profile.

 | Learn more: https://medium.com/star-atlas/star-atlas-starpath-buddy-link-referral-program-revolutionary-web3-discount-1586fcb8a021
